title: Bridge Essay: Neural correlates underlying insight problem solving: Evidence from EEG alpha os

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Neural, correlates, underlying, insight, problem.

**Neural correlates underlying insight problem solving: Evidence from EEG alpha oscillations.** — Exp Brain Res. PMID: 26048161. DOI: 10.1007/s00221-015-4338-1. Previous studies on insight problem solving using Chinese logogriphs as insight problems only investigated the time- and phase-locked changes of electrocortical responses triggered by Chinese logogriphs, but did not focus on what kind of brain state facilitates individuals to solve insight problems. To investigate this, we focused on participants' alpha activities (8-12 Hz) that closely correlates with insight problem solving and defocused attention while they were solving Chinese logogriphs.
